image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Some creatures deceive to survive. How?
Context visual: Meet Batesian mimicry, where harmless species imitate dangerous ones.
Escalation visual: This strategy confuses predators, increasing survival chances.
Evidence visual: Take the viceroy butterfly; it resembles the toxic monarch, tricking birds.
Payoff visual: But is all mimicry effective? Not always—environment plays a key role.
Cta visual: Want more mind-bending nature facts? Hit follow!
